parameters.prompt: One isolated photorealistic full-length shoulder-fired service carbine, 0.86 m long and at most 0.27 m high; length is at least 3.2 times height. Long barrel and receiver, shoulder stock well behind the pistol grip, removable box magazine ahead of the trigger, low-profile optic, charging handle, selector, trigger guard, heat shield, sling points and service latches. Restrained near-future engineering, long axis +Z. No person, hands, ammunition, bipod, floating parts, text, logo, stand, ground, or background. Reject a pistol, sidearm, stockless gun, compact SMG or PDW silhouette.
parameters.texture_prompt: De-lit photorealistic service carbine: dark phosphate steel barrel and controls, graphite anodized aluminum receiver, charcoal fiber-reinforced polymer grip and stock, heat-stained barrel shroud, low-glare optical glass, restrained amber witness accents, localized handling wear. No baked lighting, pseudo-text, logos, glowing parts, camouflage, broad grime, or damage.

strengths: single connected result now reads unmistakably as a full-length shoulder-fired rifle
long barrel, receiver, stock, grip, optic and magazine regions survive all views
required_cleanup: normalize to the authored 0.86 m envelope and verify the final 3.2:1 side silhouette
separate receiver, barrel group, stock, magazine, optic, charging handle and controls
replace ambiguous generated mechanisms and prove first-person grip and sight-line ergonomics
